programme.title: Movie: A Golden Christmas
programme.desc: Two long-lost friends reconnect during Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: The Santa Con
programme.desc: A small-time con man is ordered to take a job as a department store Santa during the holidays. Near the end of his first shift, he promises a young boy Santa will bring his estranged parents back together.

programme.title: Movie: Love at the Christmas Table
programme.desc: Two friends who have spent every Christmas together at the children's table realize they are meant to be together.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: A well-liked assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse in murdered while he closes his restaurant for the night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soft Touch
programme.desc: A case where a fingerprint left in a piece of cloth brought justice to a senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.desc: On September 29, 1982, seven unsuspecting Chicago-area residents are stricken, and then died under mysterious medical circumstances. When the actual cause of death was discovered, a task force was formed to investigate.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Double Down
programme.desc: Despite the worst conditions in a decade, the miners hedge their bets as Shawn and Ken go head to head with their largest ships ever. Emily confronts the elements while Kris leads his family with a newfound determination.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Unleash the Beast
programme.desc: Shawn's rival Ken unleashes his 600-ton gold gobbler while Shawn fights to keep a family dynasty. Vernon makes a valiant return in an attempt to strike it rich with a new dredge. Emily fights to reclaims her hotspot.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Clash of the Titans
programme.desc: An epic Clash of Titans grips the gold mining fleet as Shawn constructs the largest washplant in Nome and Ken's mining monster roars to life. Vern prospects using his new innovations. Ripping currents threaten the Kellys.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredged Up: The Sound of Money
programme.desc: Enhanced episodes of Bering Sea Gold: Under the Ice.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Storm Ravaged
programme.desc: Whipping winds and crashing waves force the miners to ask themselves how hard they're willing to fight. Shawn channels his inner MacGyver to fix a stalled machine. Kris acts boldly. Vern must make a life or death decision.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: Crisis in the Klondike
programme.desc: Enhanced episodes of 'Gold Rush' featuring extra facts, tweets and behind-the-scenes.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Storm Ravaged
programme.desc: Whipping winds and crashing waves force the miners to ask themselves how hard they're willing to fight. Shawn channels his inner MacGyver to fix a stalled machine. Kris acts boldly. Vern must make a life or death decision.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: Declaration of Independence
programme.desc: Rick and his crew of greenhorns arrive in Yukon to start the new season. Parker and Tony face off over royalties in a massive confrontation that threatens to end one of their seasons before it begins.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Crash Course
programme.desc: Dangers rise with the tide when Shawn has a mishap underwater and Emily faces a possible collision. George prospects for brother Dave and Ken Kerr and the Kellys take home a chunk of gold.

programme.title: Alaska: Most Extreme
programme.desc: Alaska is bigger, badder, stronger and more dangerously unpredictable than any other place in the nation. With America's highest mountains, most powerful earthquakes, fiercest wildlife, biggest waves, and cruellest winters, it is raw unbridled nature.

programme.title: Raw Alaska
programme.desc: An avalanche swallows a skier wearing a helmet camera. A rogue buffalo crushes a man.

programme.title: River Of No Return: Roaring Back To Life
programme.desc: As the winter ice thaws, Idaho's River of No Return flows, and the people living on its violent shores navigate the raging spring rapids. The small community hustles to work, so they can survive another season in this rugged and dangerous backcountry.

programme.title: River Of No Return: Bearing Down on the Ranch
programme.desc: A predatory bear stalks a homestead forcing the rancher to aggressively protect himself and his cattle. A jetboat engine failure in the river rapids puts Buck's operation in jeopardy. A violent storm forces bush pilots to make an emergency landing.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Secrets of the Himalaya Alien
programme.desc: When a bizarre, alien skeleton is found in an abandoned compound in the Himalayas, some speculate that it's the corpse of a newly-dead dinosaur, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of a top-secret Jurassic Park.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant
programme.desc: In Egypt, a freakish animal is caught on camera, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this strange beast could explain the secrets of a satanic deity that was once believed to have been worshiped here.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Stargate in the Jungle
programme.desc: Something strange is caught on camera in a tunnel beneath the Colombian jungle, leading experts to wonder if it's a wormhole to far-off places in the cosmos. Using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if there's an interdimensional conspiracy at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien Armageddon Conspiracy
programme.desc: A terrifying tower of fire is caught on camera, causing eyewitnesses to fear an alien invasion. Using cutting-edge science, experts investigate the threat causing this nightmarish phenomenon, and if a cover-up is hiding the truth.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Lost Tomb of Attila the Hun
programme.desc: Josh travels to Hungary to join three separate archeological teams looking for the lost tomb of Attila the Hun. Legends and ancient texts lead the search from the bottom of the Danube to the mountain forests just outside of Budapest.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Africa's Cursed Lake of Gold
programme.desc: Josh journeys to the wilds of Namibia to embark on a treacherously deep dive in Lake Otjikoto for a long lost World War I treasure.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Italy's Barbarian Booty
programme.desc: To find the plundered riches of the Roman Empire, Josh Gates must locate the tomb of the Visigoth king Alaric in Italy. The hunt extends from the capital of Rome to the southern city of Cosenza, where the mayor is spearheading an effort to find the tomb.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Search for Florida's Lost Pirate
programme.desc: Josh Gates sets sail for Florida chasing the long-lost treasure of bloodthirsty pirate Jose Gaspar. Josh joins marine archaeologists and treasure hunters working to crack the mysteries of the pirate's life so they can find the riches he left behind.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Randy Will Show You The Door
programme.desc: Bridal model Jessica is depending on her feisty friends to help her make a decision, but when they get out of control Randy has to step in. New mom Marlo is back with her outspoken twin Margo and hopes she can keep her brutally honest comments in check.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Life with Quints: Veggies...Ewww!
programme.desc: Adam and Danielle want the girls eating healthier, but the Quints aren't on board. The Busby's get surprising news about their house, forcing a big decision. Danielle dives into her new business and the family gets another visit from the Easter Bunny.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Not So Quiet Riot
programme.desc: When the Busbys agree to no more naps for the Quints, the results threaten to push Danielle to the edge as she deals with a house full of cranky 4-year-olds. Meanwhile, Adam and the girls try to come up with the perfect Mother's Day gift for Danielle.

programme.title: Counting On: Who's the Most Romantic?
programme.desc: Jinger and Jeremy go house hunting in LA but with pricier real estate and small square footage, finding the perfect place will be a challenge. Meanwhile in Arkansas, the family is going camping. Later at dinner, one couple makes a special announcement.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: A Big Decision
programme.desc: Theresa brings healing to a couple whose son took his life as a result of being bullied and is inspired to read and comfort a group of teens who have also been victimized by their peers. Theresa and Larry begin deciding whether they should separate.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Knock, Knock, It's Theresa!
programme.desc: Theresa surprises people with readings set up by their friends and family. From a salon to a doughnut shop to pretending to be a substitute babysitter, Theresa is showing up in the most unlikely places to deliver healing.

programme.title: Quints by Surprise: A Day in the Life
programme.desc: Ethan and Casey race to keep up with their 2-year-old quints and older daughter, Eliot.

programme.title: Quints by Surprise: Halloween
programme.desc: Casey and the quints put up spooky decorations and the whole family takes a trip to the pumpkin patch.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Good Quints Gone Bad
programme.desc: The Busbys tackle discipline to get the terrible twos under control. Meanwhile, Danielle presses Adam for answers on how he's been feeling. With Mimi dragging her feet moving into her new home, Danielle devises a plan to help her embrace her new life.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Extreme Quint Makeover
programme.desc: While Adam struggles with his emotional issues, the Busbys tackle a playroom makeover for the quints and Blayke. Also, Hazel gets fitted for her new glasses just in time for the girls to take the stage for their first ever recital.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Homeless Man With a House
programme.desc: Bennie and Ronda both have houses filled with stuff and lives that are empty. Decades of compulsive hoarding caused loved ones to move away.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Nowhere Near Normal
programme.desc: Extreme Hoarder Jahn struggles to clear her belongings from two houses before both are condemned.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Size Matters
programme.desc: A woman risks losing her finger after trying on an ill-fitting engagement ring. A body builder can't breathe and doctors are shocked to discover why. A doctor takes a break outside and is nearly struck by a car driven by her next patient.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Doctor's Dilemma
programme.desc: A young pregnant woman in labour begs the ER doctor to keep her pregnancy and delivery a secret from her father. Twins share similar, confusing symptoms. A man with no pulse or blood pressure is still alive and breathing, mystifying his doctors.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: An American Tail
programme.desc: Taylor has a large bump at the base of her spine that is far more dangerous than she realizes. John jokes about hip lump but turns out it's no laughing matter. Noelle had her ears stretched as a teenager, but now wants them repaired.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Loud Proud Gypsies
programme.desc: Outcast from their community, a family plans a christening with gypsy flare to reclaim their place in society. A gay gypsy couple breaks all the rules by getting married despite discrimination.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Showdown at the Altar
programme.desc: Star-crossed lovers, Heath and Alyssa, defy both sets of parents to have their dream wedding, but Heath's aunt is prepared to use excessive violence to stop them from becoming man and wife.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Cinderella Gone Wrong
programme.desc: After losing her dress in the California wildfires, Eryka comes to Kleinfeld hoping she can fall in love with a new dress. Shay helps Ashley feel sexy after losing over 100 pounds. Randy helps a desperate bride whose dress has disappeared.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Direct Message
programme.desc: Leah faces another health scare with Addie. Jade and Sean reach a boiling point, forcing her to move out. Briana is torn when she gets a suspicious DM about John. Adam surprises Aubree. Lux's father puts Kailyn in a difficult situation.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Truth Hurts

programme.desc: In Dallas, when a Good Samaritan is gunned down trying to protect his friends, detectives must unravel a tangled web of bad tips and lies in their hunt for the killer.

programme.title: The First 48: Game Over/ Long Walk Home
programme.desc: In New Orleans, a man is executed and investigators have nothing to go on. Then, a popular young woman is gunned down, leaving a community devastated.

programme.title: The First 48: Massacre in Little Haiti/ Exposed
programme.desc: A massacre outside a corner store leaves two dead and two clinging to life in Miami. In Cleveland, a man is found strangled in his apartment.

programme.title: The First 48: Cranked
programme.desc: When an innocent father is brutally stabbed, Tulsa Detective Justin Ritter delves into the dark and dangerous world of methamphetamine addiction in order to stop a killer on the edge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Browbeaten
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Murr and Joe take name-calling to new heights, the guys ask for bogus donations, and the night's big loser gets a shave that's too close for comfort.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Water Torture
programme.desc: The guys spin a wheel and creep out shoppers at the mall. And tonight's punishment leaves one Joker soaked, enraged, and totally shocked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
programme.desc: A world class roster of diverse wrestlers give fans a new wrestling experience.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Hospital
programme.desc: Inflated hospital costs have created an unfair system, reckless antibiotic prescriptions makes them worthless, and you might not need a mammogram.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Art

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins What We Learned in School
programme.desc: Adam shows that Columbus didn't discover America, King Tut was a dud, and the rules of grammar are not as ironclad as you'd think.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins College
programme.desc: Adam shares why becoming a dropout billionaire is unlikely and how school rankings have little to do with education quality. Plus, student loans.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Emily Ruins Adam
programme.desc: Emily takes over to ruin Adam, debunking IQ tests and pointing out information Adam has gotten wrong in the past. Plus, she explains the backfire effect.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Economy
programme.desc: Adam explains why doing taxes is unnecessarily complicated, the economic numbers we hear don't reveal much, and American manufacturing can't return.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Clean Eats

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Say Yes to the Veg

programme.title: North Woods Law: Spring Training
programme.desc: Officer Lucas sends a trainee to wrangle his first angry raccoon. Officer Fluette untangles a trapper's web of lies. Officer Benvenuti tries to rescue an injured gosling. Officers Boudreau and Hannett question father and son turkey hunters.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Ready to Roll

programme.title: The Zoo: The Kings of Queens

programme.title: Car Issues: The Magnum and the Viper

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Our Secret Identity
programme.desc: As a child, Pam Jacobs spent years of her life on the run from the law. But she had no idea that her father, Charles Sinclair, was a wanted man until the day the FBI caught up with them.

programme.title: Relatively Evil: Deadly Dynamics
programme.desc: A brutal murder is committed in front of the Hattenbrun home, and police must focus on several family members to catch the sadistic killer. Before long, they discover a shocking truth that no one thought possible.

programme.title: A Killing in Kendrick
programme.desc: Kendrick, Idaho, hidden away in the mountains, is the perfect place for Donna Fontaine to retire and dream of a quieter life. But Donna's dream comes to a tragic end when her house is burned down and she and her boyfriend are found shot dead inside.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hit and Run
programme.desc: Two can keep a secret, if one of them is dead. These Deadly Women think they've committed the perfect murders.

programme.title: Relatively Evil: Deadly Dynamics
programme.desc: A brutal murder is committed in front of the Hattenbrun home, and police must focus on several family members to catch the sadistic killer. Before long, they discover a shocking truth that no one thought possible.

programme.title: A Killing in Kendrick
programme.desc: Kendrick, Idaho, hidden away in the mountains, is the perfect place for Donna Fontaine to retire and dream of a quieter life. But Donna's dream comes to a tragic end when her house is burned down and she and her boyfriend are found shot dead inside.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hit and Run
programme.desc: Two can keep a secret, if one of them is dead. These Deadly Women think they've committed the perfect murders.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Our Secret Identity
programme.desc: As a child, Pam Jacobs spent years of her life on the run from the law. But she had no idea that her father, Charles Sinclair, was a wanted man until the day the FBI caught up with them.

programme.title: American Nightmare: The Answering Machine
programme.desc: When a charitable, up-and-coming actress is savagely murdered in her home, police believe an angry, revenge-hungry killer is responsible. No one could expect the lies, obsessions, and evidence that will be uncovered in this shocking cold case.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: A storm rattles the night in Key Largo, Florida, as an intruder slips silently into the home of newlyweds Michael and Missy MacIvor. As daylight clears away the rain, a nightmare is revealed that will haunt the entire community for years to come.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Deadly Business
programme.desc: Robert Henry, an exec in Tacoma, was murdered in 1995 by a masked gunman. His wife tells the Police she thought he was killed by a former business associate. Det. Yerbury investigated and pieced together the evidence that convicted Larry Shandola.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: The Evil Inside
programme.desc: At work, Kerri Harris and her friend discover a camera secreted in the ladies' restroom. Police examine the evidence, but less than 24 hours into their investigation, Kerri is found stabbed to death in her office. Her co-workers are just feet away.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Living a Lie
programme.desc: Bob Peterson invites himself to his co-workers Gene and Jaye-Jaye Thurnau's new home to give them a housewarming present. That evening, Jaye-Jaye leaves the guys to run an errand.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Murder in the Hamptons
programme.desc: Millionaire Ted Ammon was murdered in his Hamptons mansion just days before divorcing his wife, Generosa. She got $80 million, and her boyfriend got 25 years to life.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Party to Die For
programme.desc: Everyone knew that teenager Tyler Hadley's parents were strict. So how was it they were allowing him to throw a blow-out party at their house? Also, Caleb Gordley was a good kid. But when he sneaked out of the house to party, the consequences were deadly.

programme.title: 20/20: Footprints in the Snow
programme.desc: Two teenage sisters disappear amid their parents' bitter divorce battle. Their mother denies any involvement, but their father claims she knows more than she's letting on. When the girls turn up nearly three years later, will the truth finally come out?

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Missing or Murdered?
programme.desc: Shelby Wilkie has disappeared. Had she gone off the deep end, stressed by post-partum syndrome? Was she running away from her husband? Or was she murdered? As her family pleas for her return, details emerge of a life that was not all it seemed.

programme.title: Shattered: False Prophet
programme.desc: 1994. Middle River, MD. Christmas Day. A murder rocks a family's Christmas celebration... a mother prepares a holiday dinner for a son who never arrives... and a detective unearths a dark secret that shatters a town's faith.

programme.title: Shattered: The Box
programme.desc: 1996. A father in Texas seeks revenge for the savage dismemberment of his son... a girl in Mississippi desperately tries to escape the metal footlocker she has been imprisoned in... and a rookie detective is assigned a case that will define his career.

programme.title: Shattered: A Very Bad Day
programme.desc: One morning in 1994, a high school student holds his class hostage at gunpoint. As students, teachers and police are faced with impending disaster, they have no idea that the worst of the day's carnage is yet to be discovered.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Dead on Target
programme.desc: A young father-to-be is shot dead in broad daylight by a single bullet fired from afar. At the crime scene, Kenda recognizes the hallmark of a skilled sniper. But with zero evidence at his disposal, he'll rely on shoe leather detective work.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Klaus Barbie
programme.desc: The husband and wife team of Serge and Beate Klarsfeld worked tirelessly to have Nazi war criminal Klaus Barbie extradited from Bolvia to stand trail in France. Barbie, known as 'The Butch of Lyon', was responsible for the deaths of 10,000 French Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Joseph Mengele
programme.desc: Examine how Mossad agents from Israel spent nearly thirty years tracking the notorious Nazi physician Josef Mengele.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Funeral Pyres
programme.desc: Faced with the advancing Soviet troops, Nazi Germany decides to have the bodies of death camp victims dug up and burned in graves.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Time of Reckoning
programme.desc: After being judged at the Nuremberg trials, the majority of those responsible for the murders of nearly 1.5 million Jews would walk free in the 1950s.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Funeral Pyres

programme.title: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. However, two men will carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: Saddam Hussein: Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: A profile of the Iraqi leader, despised in the West but a hero to many in the Middle East.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Lone Wolves
programme.desc: Vietnam War sniper Carlos Hathcock takes on deadly covert missions, and Max Hardberger recovers illegally seized cargo ships out of dangerous third world ports.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Taking Flight
programme.desc: Rookie pilots George Welch and Kenneth Taylor battle the Japanese over Pearl Harbor, and ace fighter pilot Chuck Yeager becomes the first person to break the sound barrier.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: For a Greater Cause
programme.desc: George Rowe is a former criminal who goes undercover to bust a motorcycle gang, and the Masin brothers lead a resistance cell against Communist oppression in Czechoslovakia.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Epic Inventions
programme.desc: On this special edition, learn the real story behind the most famous flying devices in history and the truth behind our most influential inventors.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Monumental Realities
programme.desc: The myths behind some of history's most defining moments are uncovered, as well as revealing facts behind America's space explorations.

programme.title: What History Forgot: To the Ends of the World
programme.desc: Delve into the unknown stories behind some of the biggest disasters, threats and conquests in America's skies. From the attack on Pearl Harbor, the Hindenburg disaster, Apollo 13 and the race to the Moon.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Crooks
programme.desc: We all know of the 9/11 terrorist attack on NYC, the Boy Scouts and Coca-Cola and have heard the name DB Cooper. Learn the secrets behind some of America's biggest crooks, schemes and scandals.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Verge of Destruction
programme.desc: We've all heard about the fallout shelters used for refuge during World War II, the deadly firebombing of Tokyo, and the D-Day invasion on the beaches of Normandy but there are more secrets.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secret Weapons
programme.desc: Discover the unknown stories of some of the incredible plots, ploys and people behind America's secret weapons during the Cold War, the Vietnam War, and WWII.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Fort in the Woods
programme.desc: John and Heather's build is put on pause as they try to figure out how to install their drywall without covering their timber frame.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Not for Beginners
programme.desc: Time is running out for the builders to complete their projects. Chris gets help installing solar panels and sets up cameras to watch for bears. Meanwhile, Josh works on the custom log stairs as Jeremy takes his time to cut and build custom windows.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Look What They've Done
programme.desc: The builders are in the final push to finish their cabins before winter strikes and they must shut down. Josh and his team fight the elements to install the wood stove and finish the roof. Chris and his wife rush to install kitchen counters and furniture.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny House on a Lake
programme.desc: The Busbys have been living off-the-grid for two years already and want to take it to the next level. They build a super-efficient tiny house in northwestern Montana. Surrounded by stunning views, they'll build it all by hand.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Earth Block Ranch
programme.desc: A family builds thousands of earth blocks while withstanding winter monsoons, freezing temperatures and more to finish their San Antonio forever home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Windy Mountain
programme.desc: A snowmobile guide and his wife build an off-the-grid cabin by the river and mountains of their beautiful home state of Wyoming. The build includes a 272 square foot cabin with a small shop and garage. The team faces many challenges including snow.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Domes
programme.desc: Laura Williams is on a mission to build an off-the-grid home in the desert outside of Tucson, Arizona. She builds an earthen three-dome home by hand battling a steep learning curve and Mother Nature.

programme.desc: A neglected, unappealing exterior has kept Bill and Tricia's property on the market for two months. Chris and Sara give the house a fresh colour, improve the exterior layout and add other features to increase the property value.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Tiki Island Oasis
programme.desc: With the help of the native Seminole Indians, host Vanilla Ice and his crew create a one-of-a-kind Tiki island for the mansion. But it's not all fun and games when the inspector shows up for the home inspections.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: VIP Landscaping
programme.desc: Rob and the guys put their landscaping skills to the test by renovating the bombed out yard. From excavating issues to neighbor complaints, Vanilla Ice and his crew have to push through the weeds to turn the yard into a lush environment to relax in.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: The Lakeside Lounge
programme.desc: It's either sink or swim when Vanilla Ice and his crew attempt to put their lakeside property on the map by building aquatic additions that include a boat dock, beach area and an authentic tiki hut.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Modern, Zen Oasis With A Rustic Escape
programme.desc: The Mega Deck team has to turn a sunroom, concrete patio, and dirt landing by the pond into one cohesive space. After tearing out the sunroom, they build a steel framed deck with a flat roof that's connected to the existing patio.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Double Decker Deck With Out-of-the-Box Elements
programme.desc: With a half a million-dollar budget, this deck spares no expense. With features like an elevator, mahogany decking, three skylights, and glass walls and floors.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Spacious Retreat With Artistic Details
programme.desc: The Mega team overhauls an ugly, exposed and downright dangerous deck disaster. They face challenging weather, rotting wood and even an infestation while transforming two separate and unusable spaces into a sprawling, year-round retreat.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Log Cabin Lookout With a Wrap-Around Porch
programme.desc: Garth is challenged to create a modern, spacious deck while maintaining a log cabin feel. His plan includes redoing their entire wrap-around porch, adding a fire pit, and expanding the main area to become a fully enclosed glass living space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Triple Threat Deck With a Pool
programme.desc: The team builds their biggest and most expensive masterpiece over four months on a $750,000 budget. Big problems start after finishing the deck, when freezing temperatures put an indefinite hold on finishing the pool.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Mountain Retreat with a Rocky View
programme.desc: The team contends with nearly impassable roads, mountain weather and a build site on top a granite boulder.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Dream Deck With a Cozy Feel
programme.desc: Garth and the team face a huge challenge transforming a rickety, unsafe deck into a two-story masterpiece with a stone kitchen and bar, fire and water features and a spiral staircase.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Family Fun Deck With Plenty of Features
programme.desc: A 1970s-era sunroom and a small deck are taken down to create one space where a family can cook, eat, entertain, and stay warm. The finished project features a two-sided fireplace, water features, and custom privacy.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Scenic Overlook With a Private Deck
programme.desc: The team plans to create a large enclosed space that homeowners can enjoy throughout the year. As a retaining wall is uncovered, the plans for expansion come into question. They also battle cold, icy terrain and a 25-foot cliff.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Thousand Goodbyes
programme.desc: Flooring takes center stage inside the country house, while outside the barn is finally completed. The river house gets its finishing touches as Mike and MJ prepare to say goodbye to the Thousand Islands.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Holmes Stretch
programme.desc: The first property that Mike Holmes and his son, MJ, bought is the last to be finished. Time is money, and there's still a ton of work to be done before they can put the sign up on the lawn.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Families Helping Families
programme.desc: Mike is going back to his roots and helping families, along with his kids, Michael and Sherry. At a home they dub The City Barn, they plan to fix the weathered roof and make the property more accessible for a 13-year-old who is battling cancer.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Structural issues at their two clients' houses means Mike and Michael must split up and tackle the jobs separately. Michael takes on the roof and other problems at The City Barn, while Mike uncovers unsettling complications.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Wilderness Cooking
programme.desc: Roger visits the Jack Mountain Bushcraft School in Masardis, Maine where the owner and wilderness guide Tim Smith teaches him how to create a rustic kitchen outdoors.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Mexican Feast
programme.desc: Roger meets with Chef Johnny Hernandez in San Antonio, Texas and cooks regional Mexican dishes in the ultimate outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Cowboy Cooking
programme.desc: Chicken fried steak over an open fire and peach cobbler in a cast iron skillet.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hog Wild And Shuckling Delicious
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is firing up three different rigs to cook a whole hog, racks of ribs and bushels of oysters for the ultimate South Carolina-style surf and turf.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Bacon
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases the towering BLTs, juicy bacon burgers, pizzas, pies, pancakes and more with the 12 tastiest bacon dishes in America.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Salty and Smoky in the Windy City
programme.desc: Anthony Anderson hooks up with Michael Symon to discover some of the city's legendary food institutions for sensational smoke sausages and indulgent burgers.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bacon Behemoths
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Providence, where a traditional Rhode Island hot wiener in a crepe topped with chili is the ultimate local comfort food. In Indianapolis, he digs into a steak patty topped with Chinese char siu slaw.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Corn Dogs, Cheesesteaks and Ice Cream Sandwiches
programme.desc: Brad Miller heads to Seattle, where Rob Killiam of Bread and Circuses is dishing out comfort food with a playful twist.

programme.desc: Brad Miller's food truck trek starts at Wood Shop BBQ in Seattle, where Chef Matt Davis serves up massive smoked beef ribs and chicken wings tossed in his special Kansas City-style barbecue sauce. Next up is the Hapa PDX truck in Portland, Ore.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Atlanta, Ga

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey

programme.title: Carnival Kings: Deep-Fried Burger Battle
programme.desc: Fearlessly innovative artist and Michelin-starred chef Richie Farina is hitting the road in search of cutting-edge culinary competition and he's found two worthy adversaries at the biggest 'carnival' in the country.

programme.desc: Chef Richie Farina hits the road in search of cutting-edge culinary competition, and he's found it at the Great American Foodie Fest in Las Vegas, Nevada. He takes on Adam Terry of Waffle Love and his fluffy, ice cream-covered dulce de liege waffle.

programme.title: Carnival Kings: What Came First, The Burger...Or The Egg?

programme.title: Carnival Kings: Donut Burger? Bombs Away!
programme.desc: Chef Richie Farina has found an over-the-top burger battle at the Sacramento County Fair in Northern California. Al and Bobbie Sensano of Al's BBQ Pit created an all-out Asian-inspired assault on the senses.

programme.title: Carnival Kings: Why'd The Chicken Sandwich Cross The Road?
programme.desc: Chef Richie Farina hits the Alameda County Fair near the San Francisco Bay for a cutting-edge culinary competition. Phil Delahoyde's "captain's chicken sandwich" combines kids'-cereal-coated chicken and a spicy-sweet sauce into a top-selling fan favorite.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Not Fond of Fondant
programme.desc: Soon-to-be-married Josh and Jessalyn have planned everything for their French-themed wedding, with one big exception. They haven't been able to agree on the perfect cake design to represent them both.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: No Cakes on Deck
programme.desc: With just a few weeks until Geoff and Brittany's wedding the couple still can't agree on their perfect cake.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Surprise Sweet 16
programme.desc: Quiana and Anthony aim to please their daughter with the cake of her dreams for her surprise sweet 16th birthday party. Wuiana wants a sparkly cake fit for a teen, but Anthony wants a cake better suited to a little girl.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Mint For Each Other
programme.desc: With only two weeks until their wedding, Pat and Alli are looking for the perfect cake that pays tribute to his time in the armed services and plays to her love of classic, rustic elegance.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Game Day Munchies
programme.desc: Host Alfonso Ribeiro serves up a fantasy league of snacks. Clear off the coffee table for Home Run Inn's Meat Lovers Pizza and the cheese and caramel popcorn mix from Garrett's in Chicago.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Can't Eat Just One
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro dives into Hot Tamales and their addictive cinnamon snap, Nathan's irresistible chili cheese fries and finds out how Dum Dums lollipops got their name. Finally, he finds out about Annie Chun's flavor-packed Mini Wontons.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Cheese Glorious Cheese
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro proves that no matter how you slice it, cheese just makes everything better. Find out how TGI Fridays' cheddar bacon potato skin appetizer gets turned into a yummy chip and how Mom Made Cheesy Mac tastes.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Go Nuts
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro and Unwrapped 2.0 go nuts for nuts! Tumbled in sugar, nestled in chocolate, whatever you do with nuts, it's hard to go wrong. Find out how one candy bar did active military duty in WW1.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Wing and I
programme.desc: Prepare America's most ubiquitous of bar foods, Buffalo chicken wings.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Pit Stop
programme.desc: Pittsburgh has Ali Khan flipping over some cheesy pancakes, and battles a sub that might blow the classic Philly cheesesteak out of the water. He discovers the secrets to Pittsburgh's best pretzels.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Bayside Bites
programme.desc: In Baltimore, Ali Khan comes face-to-face with bacon-infused pancakes fit for 'the king', then channels his inner Neanderthal for his first taste of Maryland pit beef.

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly head to Germany to replace the bird in Bob's cuckoo clock. While on a scuba vacation, the pugs search the coral reefs for Bob's lost diving flippers.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Dream Vacation/ The Mystery of the Missing Golf Ball
programme.desc: The pugs want to take Bob on his dream vacation to Tahiti; Bingo and Rolly search the golf course for Bob's missing ball.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Luna's Cosmic Tantrum/ Motsuki The Best
programme.desc: Motsuki becomes Owelette's sidekick; Motsuki traps Luna Girl on the moon.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Scuba-Doggies/ Walking the Bob
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on an underwater adventure to retrieve a lost package. After a visit to the eye doctor, it's up to the pups to lead a blurry-eyed Bob home.

programme.title: Bluey: The Weekend / BBQ / Fruitbat
programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the garden; Bingo searches for ingredients for a salad; Bluey dreams about a fruit bat.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy and his fairy godparents have magical adventures.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairly OddPet
programme.desc: Jealous that everyone else in Dimmsdale has a dog, Timmy adopts a fairy dog. But this proves to be a bigger challenge than Timmy expected.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: School of Crock
programme.desc: Mr. Crocker becomes a teacher at the Fairy Academy and tries to steal all the students' magic! Meanwhile, Poof is going through 'pooferty' and is finally learning to speak!

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Slippin Thru My Fingers/ Driving Dave Crazy
programme.desc: In order to get Dave off their backs, the Chipmunks decide to find him a new girlfriend. Dave orders the Chipmunks to clean their room, but in the process, they accidentally ruin Dave's new song for the music festival.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Baby Mama Drama/ Ballet Boys
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany learn parenting isn't easy when they have to care for a robot baby for a school assignment.When Alvin's soccer team struggles, the coach makes the team learn ballet to help with their conditioning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tutor Sauce/ Lost in Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to take a shortcut to work, but gets lost along the way. After failing his driver's test, Mr. Krabs decides to teach SpongeBob how to drive himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Giant Squidward/ No Nose Knows
programme.desc: When Squidward gets spritzed with plant growth spray, he becomes monstrously huge. Patrick gets a nose.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Two Faces of Squidward/ Spongehenge
programme.desc: SpongeBob slams the door in Squidward's face; Squidward gets surgery and becomes handsome.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Not Normal/ Gone
programme.desc: SpongeBob makes it his mission to become completely normal, and he begins to lose all his spongey-ness. SpongeBob wakes up one morning to find that everyone in Bikini Bottom is gone, even Gary.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Secret Box/ Band Geeks
programme.desc: Pat has a secret box that drives SpongeBob crazy; Squid recruits SpongeBob for his band.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wet Painters/ Krusty Krab Training Video
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has SpongeBob and Patrick paint the inside of his house; training for employees.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Lost Mattress/ Krabs vs. Plankton
programme.desc: Bob buys Mr. Krabs a new mattress; Plankton sues Mr. Krabs for failing to post a warning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chimps Ahoy/ Ghost House
programme.desc: The Chimpanzee beneficiaries of Sandy's undersea tree dome are paying a visit to see what progress she has made with her inventions. The Flying Dutchman takes up residence at SpongeBob's house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Good Neighbors/ Skill Crane
programme.desc: Squidward obsesses over winning a stuffed animal; Squid's security system backfires.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shuffleboarding/ Prefessor Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get carried away when they fill in for Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. Squidward poses as the teacher at a prestigious music school. But SpongeBob and Patrick show up and nearly blow his cover.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Banned From Bikini Bottom/ Stanley S. Squarepants
programme.desc: Miss Priss has Krabby Patties banned from Bikini Bottom; SpongeBob's cousin visits.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wormy/ Patty Hype
programme.desc: The gang thinks that Sandy's pet caterpillar has been consumed by a 'monster' butterfly; Bob markets his coloured crabcakes to the Krusty Krab's clientele.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Greasy Buffoons/ Model Sponge
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton woo customers with greasy entrees. SpongeBob tries a career at being a model in a kitchen sponge commercial.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Great Patty Caper
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick and Plankton solve a mystery.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Thru/ The Hot Shot

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Best Day Ever
programme.desc: Spongebob decides he is going to have the best day ever.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Penny Foolish/ Nautical Novice

programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.desc: The Colossus is in dire need of hyperfuel, and Kaz suggests they take it from a downed First Order ship. The salvage mission is compromised when the First Order shows up.

programme.title: Movie: Kin
programme.desc: On the same day that his older brother is released from prison, a boy finds a deadly alien weapon in a junkyard. With a revenge-seeking crime lord, inquisitive government agents and dangerous alien soldiers all after them, the brothers go on the run.

programme.title: Ballers: Players Only
programme.desc: Examine the lives of a group of football players, their families, friends and handlers.

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
programme.desc: The outspoken comedian discusses hot topics.

programme.title: Movie: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Having returned from fighting in the Crusades, Robin Hood turns to thievery as a way of rebelling against the tyrannical Sheriff of Nottingham. With the help of his Merry Men, he comes up with a daring plan to empty the Sheriff's own treasury.

programme.title: The Righteous Gemstones
programme.desc: A deviant family of greedy, world famous televangelists live their lives.

programme.title: The Deuce: This Trust Thing
programme.desc: A look at life in NYC during the 1970s and '80s when porn and prostitution ruled.

programme.title: Movie: Search Party
programme.desc: Hijinks and misadventures abound when a young man's two best friends step up to rescue him after a carjacking and reunite him with his wayward bride-to-be.

programme.title: Movie: Welcome to Marwen
programme.desc: After a horrific attack leaves him broken and with no memories, Mark Hogancamp copes with his painful and confusing life by building a miniature replica of a World War II village, complete with resident dolls that resemble himself and his friends.

programme.title: Movie: Funny Games
programme.desc: An exploration of violence in society and the effects of it on a middle class family.

programme.title: Clinica de Migrantes
programme.desc: 'Clínica de Migrantes' goes beyond the politicized rhetoric to show the faces of real people in the middle of the immigration debate, asking if America can continue withholding basic necessities from an estimated 11 million undocumented immigrants.

programme.title: Movie: Delta Farce
programme.desc: Three Army reservists on route to Iraq accidentally get dropped in a Mexican village.

programme.title: Movie: Getaway
programme.desc: When his wife gets kidnapped, an ex-racecar driver steals a car and drags the car's owner into a high-speed chase.

programme.title: Movie: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: After a year of dating, an American woman accompanies her boyfriend to Asia to attend his cousin's wedding, and discovers that his family is incredibly rich. She finds it difficult to be accepted, especially by his domineering and controlling mother.

programme.title: Movie: Life as We Know It
programme.desc: When their mutual best friends die, two single adults find themselves named as guardians of their friend's orphaned daughter.

programme.title: Movie: The Darkest Minds
programme.desc: After most of the country's children and teens are killed by a plague, the survivors begin developing mutant abilities and are deemed a threat by the government, which imprisons them, but a sixteen-year-old girl escapes and joins a resistance group.

programme.title: Movie: Ever After: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A strong-willed girl catches the eye of a charming prince and finds true love.

programme.title: Movie: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: A family man and snowplow driver is named his small town's citizen of the year for his lifetime of service to the snowy community, but his euphoria is shattered when his son turns up dead, transforming the father into a killer out for revenge.

programme.title: Real Sports With Bryant Gumbel
programme.desc: Goes beyond the scores and statistics to present a critical look at the world of sports.

programme.title: The Righteous Gemstones
programme.desc: A deviant family of greedy, world famous televangelists live their lives.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
programme.desc: Comedian John Oliver offers his satirical take on news, current events and politics.

programme.title: Movie: Mary Queen of Scots
programme.desc: The former Queen of France returns to Scotland to claim the throne that is rightfully hers, and forges a friendship with her cousin Elizabeth, the Queen of England, but when Mary presses her own claim to the English throne they become bitter rivals.

programme.title: Torn Apart: Separated at the Border

programme.desc: A mountain climber must resort to desperate measures after becoming trapped under a boulder in the desert.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Designing Spaces
programme.desc: We travel all of the country redefining and redesigning space. Inspiring viewers to take on all home improvement challenges and decorating dilemmas.

programme.title: The Closer: Elysian Fields
programme.desc: The squad investigates the murder of a man who, 10 years ago, was the lead suspect in the murder of two girls. The state of the body indicates he was dragged behind a truck a full day before being shot twice in the head and dumped in Elysian Park.

programme.title: The Closer: Identity Theft
programme.desc: A confessed murderer gets details of the crime wrong during his allocution, causing Brenda to re-open the case. Her first thought is that he is trying to cover for his schizophrenic son, whose doctor was the victim.

programme.title: The Closer: Smells Like Murder
programme.desc: A large cooler with a body stuffed inside leads Brenda in search of suspects. Gabriel is studying for the detective exam, so Brenda uses the case as a teaching tool.

programme.title: The Closer: Maternal Instincts
programme.desc: A shooting spree in broad daylight leaves two people dead, another critically wounded and a car loaded with marijuana. But there's some confusion as to the identity of the intended victim and the motive behind the crime.

programme.title: Movie: A Star for Christmas
programme.desc: A cupcakery owner falls for her hunky new customer just in time for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: The Spirit of Christmas
programme.desc: An ambitious lawyer heads to Vermont to broker the sale of an old inn. She learns it is haunted by a man who died 95 years ago. He takes human form every year exactly twelve days before Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Reunion
programme.desc: An executive discovers an unusual Christmas surprise when she inherits her aunt’s hometown bakery. The real surprise comes when she learns the other half of the bakery was left to her long-ago boyfriend.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Into Madness
programme.desc: An illness that is difficult to diagnose causes symptoms that resemble schizophrenia.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Family Secret
programme.desc: In 2012, Mark Staudte, a father and local musician, abruptly became ill. Nine months later his daughter suddenly became ill and was hospitalized in critical condition. Doctors wondered what was happening until one phone call changed everything.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Code to Gold
programme.desc: Josh scours Virginia backcountry in search of the legendary Thomas Beale Treasure, worth millions today. With encrypted codes hiding its whereabouts, Josh takes a detour to Philadelphia to uncover missing pieces to the puzzle.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Origins of Stonehenge
programme.desc: Josh travels to his ancestral home of Great Britain to explore the origins of Stonehenge. From high in the air to deep under the sea, he finds an unexpected network of monuments that could have inspired one of history's most mystical locations.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Chasing the Snake Kings
programme.desc: Josh Gates returns to Guatemala with a potential breakthrough in the search for a Snake King tomb.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Unearthed: Gold Rush of the Atlantic
programme.desc: Unearthed with extra facts and bonus footage: Josh Gates dives into the National Archives of Cuba in search of ground-breaking information which can lead him to the 1715 Spanish Fleet that sunk off the coast of Florida.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Search for the Sultan's Heart
programme.desc: Four years after Josh Gates went on a journey to find the lost heart of Sultan Suleiman the Magnificent, he travels to the newly rediscovered town of Turbek for some shocking new revelations about the case.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Floating Castle
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home. They have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bamboo House
programme.desc: Bamboo-home architect David Sands builds a getaway in Hawaii with a luxurious outdoor bath area and a detached, starlit master bedroom. But volcanic eruptions threaten to send the project in smoke.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Search for the Sultan's Heart
programme.desc: Four years after Josh Gates went on a journey to find the lost heart of Sultan Suleiman the Magnificent, he travels to the newly rediscovered town of Turbek for some shocking new revelations about the case.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Floating Castle
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home. They have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Underground Living
programme.desc: Specialty builders Jon and Amanda D'Aleo design and build 'Earth-sheltered' homes for clients in Southern Colorado, but they weren't expecting a project this far off the grid.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Gold of Scotland
programme.desc: John joins treasure hunters in the Scottish Highlands chasing a lead on a lost cache of gold that was hidden after the Jacobite Uprising of 1745 and never recovered.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: The Raneys make a self-automated homestead to function while firefighters Kim and Casey Boespflug are away on duty.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Flood, Sweat, and Tears: Part One
programme.desc: The Raneys must build a dam and plan an entire cabin move to help the Smith family in a Missouri flood zone.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mountain Man Cave
programme.desc: Joe Donovan, an avid skier and adventurer, has found the perfect spot for his permanent base camp on a remote ridge in southwest Montana. Follow the adventure as he battles the elements to build his rustic, straw bale, dream cabin.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Massive Mud Home
programme.desc: Summer and Jack moved away from New Jersey after getting engaged to live off the grid. They buy a plot of land in Sedro Wooley, Washington and have commissioned Sunray Kelley to design and build their dream mud home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin of No Return
programme.desc: An outdoorsy family of three is determined to build a mammoth off-grid cabin along Idaho's Salmon River after one of their properties was destroyed by a fire. The family takes on rapids to portage out materials and must finish before low tide hits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Mountaintop
programme.desc: A couple builds their off-grid dream home on a remote mountaintop overlooking the Southwest Montana backcountry. Together they've dreamed up a mountain base camp that's high tech and suits their outdoor lifestyle.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Earth Home
programme.desc: A young couple sets out to build their dream home together in a remote canyon just north of Yellowstone National Park in Montana. They create a timeless, earthen home suited for their challenging climate.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Glacier River Cabin
programme.desc: A young couple leave the Air Force to build a cabin and start a new life in Alaska. With only three weeks to make it ready before winter, they call in family and friends to help. Follow their journey as they endure the elements and handcraft their home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Floating Castle
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home. They have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

programme.title: River Of No Return: Roaring Back To Life
programme.desc: As the winter ice thaws, Idaho's River of No Return flows, and the people living on its violent shores navigate the raging spring rapids. The small community hustles to work, so they can survive another season in this rugged and dangerous backcountry.

programme.title: River Of No Return: Bearing Down on the Ranch
programme.desc: A predatory bear stalks a homestead forcing the rancher to aggressively protect himself and his cattle. A jetboat engine failure in the river rapids puts Buck's operation in jeopardy. A violent storm forces bush pilots to make an emergency landing.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: From the Ashes
programme.desc: A biology student and an expert survival instructor team up on the swampy shore of Croatia. A strong partnership is forged through braving the elements and facing their demons, but takes a turn for the worst with a freak accident.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Easier Said Than Done
programme.desc: After a nation-wide search, two lucky fans were selected to take on a special 14-day survival challenge. A nurturing mother and an independent adventurer try to survive in the rainforests of Nicaragua.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: 200% Trouble With This Dress
programme.desc: It's all about the bling when Samantha falls for a dress that's twice her budget. Krystina wants simple while her mom wants over the top. Shannon ordered a custom gown for her Irish I do's.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: This Is My Fiancé...and This Is His Wife!
programme.desc: Bride Jennifer arrives at Kleinfeld with her fiancé - and his wife. Glori only wants the trendiest of gowns straight off the latest runway. Amanda needs to leave with a dress today for her wedding inside a chapel made of ice.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Did I Hear Someone Say $16,000?
programme.desc: Randy's day is nonstop as he assists brides and auditions models for his runway show. Bride Emanuela wants a sexy ball gown and she's not afraid to throw her dad's budget out the window. Marlena is finally dress shopping for a wedding years in the making.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Holly's Story
programme.desc: Holly already has one failed weight loss surgery, so to succeed this time, she must do more than change her eating habits, she must address the childhood issues that continue to plague her.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Three Apartments, Three Hoarders
programme.desc: An apartment complex has not one, not two, but three extreme hoarders. For years their hoarding has gone unchecked but with building now under strict management, everything is about to change.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: This House Killed Her
programme.desc: After their mother's death, siblings Aimee, Cheryl and Jimmy are left to deal with a house filled with clutter.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Holly's Story
programme.desc: Holly already has one failed weight loss surgery, so to succeed this time, she must do more than change her eating habits, she must address the childhood issues that continue to plague her.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Three Apartments, Three Hoarders
programme.desc: An apartment complex has not one, not two, but three extreme hoarders. For years their hoarding has gone unchecked but with building now under strict management, everything is about to change.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: This House Killed Her
programme.desc: After their mother's death, siblings Aimee, Cheryl and Jimmy are left to deal with a house filled with clutter.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Theresa on Tour
programme.desc: We join Theresa on the road on her incredible cross-country tour. In city after city she delivers healing messages, but this time, she's going from sold-out crowds to an empty house, now that Larry has moved out.

programme.title: Quints by Surprise: The 5 Turn 5
programme.desc: Ethan and Casey celebrate the quints' fifth birthday with their first slumber party.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Multiple Births, Multiple Birthdays
programme.desc: The Busbys plan a joint birthday party for all their girls, but when Blayke wants her own party Adam and Danielle must come up with a way to make her feel special.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: The Nightmare Before Easter
programme.desc: It's Easter time and the Busbys have tons of fun activities planned for the holiday, but their extra special surprise may turn into a nightmare. When Adam reveals his unorthodox plan for dealing with his issues, Danielle has a tough decision to make.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: How Do I Get Out of This
programme.desc: Linda's hoarding escalated when her marriage began deteriorating. Now, her entire family is on the brink of collapse.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Oh My Gosh
programme.desc: The condition of Tammy's home has become so bad, that she's forced to eat her meals in the car and her sick father is unable to come home from the hospital.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Escaping Diagnosis
programme.desc: A disoriented young woman in a bunny costume lands in the ER on April Fool's Day. A doctor treats a patient whose severed thumb needs reattachment, but can't treat another patient's less severe cut.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Heeled!
programme.desc: A man is impaled in his abdomen by a stiletto heel. A seemingly healthy outdoorsman has a series of seizures that baffle his doctors. Two patients make their doctor suspicious when they both complain about identical headaches that started during sex.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Dr. Sandra Lee is a renowned dermatological surgeon who is tasked with removing life-altering growths from her patients' skin so they can try to reclaim their lives.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Gypsy Traditions and Superstitions
programme.desc: Families turn hostile when gypsy teens from different clans bypass important traditions at their wedding.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Nukkie and Pookie (Finally) Say I Do
programme.desc: Two gypsy sweethearts finally plan their long awaited wedding despite their mothers' disapproval. However, the grudge has spread to other family members, and the couple wonders if it will ever be put to rest. Plus, an ex-con gypsy tries to move forward.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Mom's Not on the Guest List
programme.desc: Kayla comes to Kleinfeld with her family to find her dream wedding dress but with one catch; they're not invited to the wedding! Dori wants to show her own style with a new dress while mom and Mama Dolly strongly encourage her to wear their 1950s gown.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: The Ridiculousness 500

programme.desc: Vince's girlfriend, Liz, breaks up with him because he cannot find an escape from his online-ex, Alyssa. Nev and Max help Vince confront Alyssa, to mend his relationship with Liz.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Cassie and Steve

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scarytales
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: Find out which joker once included inline skating as a skill on his resume, who was a mathlete and a bowler in high school and which joker was afraid of the dark as a child.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Unmotivational Speaker
programme.desc: Find out which classic Joker’s lines are still being uttered and which of the Alma Mater’s gets mentioned. Plus, what inspired tonight’s punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Just Say No
programme.desc: Find out which joker loves blackjack, what baseball team two of the guys split season tickets for and how they found the lovely lady whose heart Q broke during his ball field punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.
