programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Javan Tiger
programme.desc: Forrest delves into the vibrant island of Java in Indonesia in an attempt to find the Javan Tiger. This exotic predator was declared extinct in 2003, but recently, park rangers and locals have had sightings and are collecting evidence of its existence.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Formosan Clouded Leopard
programme.desc: Declared extinct only recently, Forrest is tracking clues and eyewitness accounts that suggest that the Formosan Clouded Leopard could still be alive. He treks deep into the jungles of Taiwan where a run-in with a predator might just solve a mystery.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: White Wolf of Newfoundland
programme.desc: Forrest teams up with a specialist in Newfoundland in search of the White Wolf, a predator that was declared extinct in 1930. They meet with a hunter that shot what is believed to be a wolf and uncover evidence that suggests the species could be alive.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Tasmanian Tiger Down Under
programme.desc: After numerous, credible eyewitness accounts of the Tasmanian Tiger in Australia, James Cook University has researchers on the move. Forrest joins their study before heading deep into the Cape York Peninsula in his second attempt to find the species.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Pondcherry Shark
programme.desc: Forrest Galante heads to the Maldives to find the supposedly extinct ponderry shark, a rare species last seen in the 1970s. Unidentified sharks in the area have led many to believe it's alive and Forrest is determined to prove it's not extinct.

programme.title: Little Giants: Microzilla
programme.desc: A global expedition to spotlight the astonishing abilities of tiny animals begins in the Mexican desert as Bradley Trevor Greive and Billy Almon track down and test the jaw-dropping, almost supernatural abilities of the giant horned lizard.

programme.title: Little Giants: Adorable Assassin
programme.desc: The team heads to Madagascar to study the recently discovered Goodman's mouse lemur, one of the smallest primates on the planet. This velvet pinball makes up for its tiny size with its incredible agility, breakneck speed and startling ferocity.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Tasmanian Tiger
programme.desc: The ferocious Tasmanian Tiger was declared extinct 80 years ago, yet sightings are still reported. A trio of experts venture into Tasmania's undeveloped wilderness in search of one of the most unique and terrifying predators ever to walk the earth.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bears Will Be Bears
programme.desc: The brown bears keep tearing up their exhibit, leaving zoo staff scrambling for a solution. Armani the aardvark gets treated for a tooth infection which has dampened her enthusiasm for digging. And, a group of burrowing owls prepare to move.

programme.title: The Zoo: Snow Monkey Social
programme.desc: A new bison calf has a hard time keeping up with his mom. The bird department prepares a group of Von der Decken hornbill chicks for their big move to the Minnesota Zoo. And keepers at the Central Park Zoo hope the female snow monkeys accept a new male.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Atlanta: Big Money in Buckhead

programme.title: Flip or Flop Atlanta: Rundown Rental House Redo

programme.title: Flip or Flop Atlanta: The Cabin in the Woods

programme.title: Flip or Flop Atlanta: Go Bigger or Go Home

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Attila's Sword of Mars
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are tasked with forging fantasy blades from a meteorite. The smiths battle difficult forge welds using the canister method to create their blades. The final two must recreate a legendary weapon, Attila the Hun's Sword of Mars.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Gone With the Schwinn
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are presented with a huge truckload of personal tapes from Rat Pack legend Sammy Davis Jr. Rick meets a man with a mysterious miniature cannon believed to be from the 18th century.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: The guys are presented with a mysterious whisky flash from the Civil War era.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Offer
programme.desc: The guys check out a 1956 Chevy drag racing car. When someone brings in a historic magician's box, the guys learn that cutting Chumlee in half is the easiest part.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Corey's Big Play
programme.desc: The guys check out a 1924 Dodge Brothers sedan complete with the original wooden wheels. A man drags in a 19th-century ball and chain that's inside a Wells Fargo strongbox.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Grumpy Old Man
programme.desc: Rick checks out a recorded telephone conversation of President John F. Kennedy. Then, an F16 flight suit comes into the shop. Meanwhile, Chumlee tries to record the Old Man yelling at him.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chum-parazzi
programme.desc: The guys check out a poem written and signed by inventor Nikola Tesla. Then, a pair of wooly chaps ride into the shop. Later, Chumlee goes on a quest for a famous musician's autograph.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Brew Master
programme.desc: A medal believed to be a Polish White Eagle soars into the shop and Rick must decide whether to go all in or sit this one out. Corey and Chumlee race to check out a brick from the Indianapolis Motor Speedway. Later, Chumlee attempts the perfect home brew.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rick, Rock, and Roll
programme.desc: Two first editions of 'A Christmas Carol' appear in the shop and Corey must decide if he'll cough up the cash. Then, Rick gets rocked when a meteorite drops in. Later, Chumlee plans a night of bowling with the guys.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Promissory Pawn
programme.desc: A water propelled jetpack; a promissory note from the Mexican-American War;a statue of the Hindu god Shiva.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Behind the Wheel
programme.desc: A 1923 Babe Ruth baseball card arrives at the shop as well as an unrestored children's tricycle from the 1930s. Later, Corey totals his truck and is forced to drive the company car with Rick's face on it.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawning Pistols
programme.desc: A pair of Duck's Foot pistols, a bar of Yellow Kid soap from an 1896 newspaper comic, a Vicotrian-era hand crank device.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Silver Stash Pawn
programme.desc: A first edition of the Adventures of Bob Hope comic; an ancient Egyptian mummy mask; a 1950s Disney fire extinguisher.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Under Pressure
programme.desc: A drawing of John Lennon; Senator William Sharon's engraved menu from the Comstock Lode; a Role water pressure tester; a 1950s Buddy Lee doll.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Pawnshine State
programme.desc: Rick and Chumlee travel to the Sunshine State to look at a fully loaded 1954 Rybovich Yacht. Rick visits another pawn shop while in Florida, owned by his friend Lisa. Meanwhile in Vegas, Corey's quite busy with a huge Incredible Hulk comic collection.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: In the Presence of Greatness
programme.desc: A Batman utility belt toy from the 1960s is within Rick and Chum's grasp. An impeccable Mosrite electric guitar could be a sweet deal for the shop. Rick continues to search for 'The Object,' an item featured on the cover of Led Zeppelin's 'Presence.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Pistol Is Mightier Than the Sword
programme.desc: Rick checks out a sword-pistol combo from the 1700s. A portrait of John Barrymore, the famous film and theatre actor, may be worth a buy. Rick learns about an antique navigational timepiece from the 19th century. Corey's excited about a 1969 Harley.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Triple Crown Pawn
programme.desc: Corey bets it all on an original Triple Crown Trophy; let's see if he can win this horse race. Next the guys call in Rick Dale to save what might be one of the very first rides from Coney Island.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn to the Rescue
programme.desc: Rick is in search of his own personal fire truck. Then, Chumlee chases an antique from one of the very first underground transportation systems, and Corey and Rick pursue an exclusive item that belonged to Hunter S. Thompson.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Shallow Grave

programme.title: 48 Hours: Vengeance in Vegas

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: He'd Do It Again

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Last Face She Saw

programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Courage at Sea
programme.desc: The biggest naval battle in history will be decided when a small group of under-armed, ill-prepared US ships find themselves in a chaotic and ferocious fight against the largest battleships ever built.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Okinawa: Island Fortress
programme.desc: US troops come up against 120,000 Japanese soldiers on the island of Okinawa. Fighting through mountainous terrain and in treacherous conditions, American forces triumph and pave the way for the end of World War Two.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II
programme.desc: World War II myths are explored. Forgotten truths of America's Civil War are examined.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Science or Sci-Fi?
programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War II
programme.desc: By the end of the 70's, war between East and West has been raging for decades. Countless proxy wars have proven how destructive the Cold War can be. It's an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War, Hot War
programme.desc: A look at the crucial events of the 1960s: U.S. troops in Vietnam, the USSR's warheads in Cuba and the moon landing.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: What Comes Down Must Go Up
programme.desc: Facing major structural and water issues at the river house, Mike and MJ decide to take the whole house down so they can build it back up right. This is a major setback, and their profit will take a big hit unless they identify some areas to save.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions and Delays
programme.desc: Trusses go up at the river house until MJ learns that the permits for the new build have not yet been approved. Mike goes to the council meeting hoping to hear good news, but it's a waiting game in the meantime. Designer Sarah Richardson offers advice.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Debates, Decisions, Designer
programme.desc: The leaching bed is replaced at the country house, and work progresses until Mike and MJ find out an open permit remains on the barn. Later, the big day finally arrives when MJ and Lisa get married in a picturesque setting, as long as the rain holds off.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Structural issues at their two clients' houses means Mike and Michael must split up and tackle the jobs separately. Michael takes on the roof and other problems at The City Barn, while Mike uncovers unsettling complications.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Not a Dry Eye in the House
programme.desc: The Flood House is close to completion and the showpiece gas fireplace with a custom mantel brings one of the homeowners to tears. Over at The City Barn, more structural issues arise, creating greater challenges than Mike and the team expected.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: After a contractor holds Laura and Greg's new kitchen hostage for four months, even threatening to put a lien on their home, the desperate couple turn to the one contractor they can trust.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Ain't Seen Nothing Yet
programme.desc: After hiring her neighbour to renovate her kitchen, Lali has nothing but a demo to show for the $11,000 she paid him.

programme.desc: The Flood House is close to completion and the showpiece gas fireplace with a custom mantel brings one of the homeowners to tears. Over at The City Barn, more structural issues arise, creating greater challenges than Mike and the team expected.

programme.title: Lawn and Order: Overgrown and Outdated
programme.desc: Confusing front doors and an eyesore exterior are just a few of the problems sisters Brenna and Kirsten got when they inherited their childhood home.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Home Sweet Yurt
programme.desc: Yurt builders Nathan and Jenny Toler live in a village of yurts on the North Shore of Oahu but their family is growing, so they're adding on and building a whopping 1,400-square-foot yurt at the far end of their property.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Namaste Yurt
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny Toler meet up with clients Sara and Shawn who want to expand their current home in Haleiwa, Hawaii, to include a multi-functional 16-foot yurt that will serve as a yoga studio and lounge space.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Waterside Yurt
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny build a Moroccan-style yurt for client Maisa who wants an affordable place that's all her own on her family's waterfront property.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Flippin' on Broken Glass
programme.desc: A couple want to flip a house in order to spend more time with each other. They soon find out they have bitten off more than they can chew when one is forced to do all the heavy lifting and the other's design ideas become increasingly more expensive.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: The Not-So-Handyman
programme.desc: Real estate agent Tabitha enlists her husband, Quincy, to flip a house with her in a quiet suburb outside Atlanta. As the flip goes on, Tabitha realizes that Quincy is not as handy as he claims to be, and the quality of the flip starts to suffer.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: No Gutters, No Glory
programme.desc: A young married couple has decided to flip a house with the help of her brother. While the flip starts off well, the project soon falls behind. The guys want to move quickly but she is concerned that important details are being overlooked.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Lonely Star State Flip
programme.desc: A young couple finds themselves in deep water on a flip in Pecan Grove, Texas. While he works on an oil rig for two weeks at a time, she struggles to find projects she can take on alone while she cares for their baby. The stress of their open house is on!

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Flip Out of Reach
programme.desc: A husband and wife set out to flip a spacious home all by themselves in Baltimore. As a real estate agent, she knows what the people want, but he worries her-high end tastes and minimal experience will sabotage their profits.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Rebuilder's Remorse
programme.desc: A husband recruits the help of his wife to flip their first home in Grand Forks, ND. She loves demo but things get tricky when it comes time for rebuild. He realizes he might not have the best partner to navigate the waters of the rebuild process.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: I Now Pronounce You Flippers
programme.desc: A young couple simultaneously plans a wedding and flips their first house together in Miami, FL. While they thought they would save money, their inexperience ends up delaying them at every turn leading them to dip into their wedding budget.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Communication Is Turnkey
programme.desc: A young married couple flips a house in South Bend, Indiana and struggles to communicate during the flip. He has more experience and gets frustrated with his wife's lack of construction knowledge. She gets upset when he fails to explain the projects.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Fluff and Buff
programme.desc: Longtime friends flip their first house in St. Paul, Minnesota but, when they discover a substantial mold infestation, the flip becomes delayed and the two friends clash over the budget and work load.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: A Rock Star Reveal
programme.desc: Before the big reveal, Rob calls upon style guru Krista to furnish the house and bring her eye for design to each room. The ninjas add a security camera and a water purifier that converts humidity into drinking water. The final reveal turns into a party.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Commotion by the Ocean
programme.desc: Rob and the ninjas are back in action looking for their next project, and Rob has his hands full with amazing properties. But, the house that speaks to Rob has big problems. Will the ninjas be able to see the potential?

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Hip-hop Hibachi
programme.desc: Rob designs a VIP hibachi grill for the hero house with fiber-optic lights that change colors with the push of a button.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: The Crown Jewel Pool
programme.desc: The existing pool looks more like a sewer than a swimming pool and it has got to go. Rob has grand plans to turn this frog into a prince. By changing its location and giving it a whole new shape, it'll become the crown jewel it was meant to be.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Fixin' the Kitchen
programme.desc: Rob has an idea to transform his dated kitchen space into a chef's retreat. Floor to ceiling sliders replace the far wall and provide a view to the ocean. The kitchen is given bran new appliances and a window backsplash.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Making an Entrance
programme.desc: The current entryway is dated and hated, so the ninjas open up the space and add modern glass features and a high-tech elevator.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: From Virtual to Reality
programme.desc: Technology and style go toe-to-toe when the ninjas tackle the spare rooms and game room. White walls disappear as an underwater mural takes shape and marine windows are installed.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Wrath of the Bath
programme.desc: Rob and the ninjas give the master bath a clean and serene upgrade with luxurious finishes. New marble floors, an elegant vanity and an all-glass shower make this a relaxation station fit for royalty.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Mountain Feast
programme.desc: Ali hits the Jackson Hole, Wyo., trail running for a delicious croque madame with mornay sauce in the morning and crosses the Snake River for a crunchy fried chicken banh mi sandwich.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Crossroad Foodie
programme.desc: Ali paves the way in Salt Lake City with a zesty pound cake-inspired French toast, then gets wasted on a burger topped with fried guacamole. A biker bar sends him to heaven with a Utah staple, fried Mormon funeral potatoes.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Family Feast
programme.desc: In Memphis, Michael Symon sits down with four generations of barbecue royalty for the scoop on their most delicious family secrets, with a side of smoked turkey and sweet potato fried pie.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brunchtime Bbq
programme.desc: In Charleston, S.C., Michael Symon smokes a whole hog and makes chorizo from scratch for a saucy BBQ brunch burrito with two different fire-roasted salsas. In Atlanta, an authentic Caribbean roasted pork sandwich has a dedicated local following.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beastly Burgers
programme.desc: Michael Symon gets things started in Boston where a whole smoked hog is getting the royal treatment with a marinade injection, a salt crust and a foil wrap for crispy skin. Then in Phoenix, a wolf of a burger gets topped with smoked pulled pork.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: O.G. Flavor
programme.desc: Michael Symon visits his hometown of Cleveland, where a lamb burger with kalamata olive salt gives him a nostalgic taste of his Greek heritage.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smokin' Sides And Sweets
programme.desc: No cookout is complete without some outrageous side dishes and craveworthy desserts, so Roger Mooking is putting the main course aside to honor everything that tops off the best barbecue meals.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Weekend BBQs
programme.desc: Roger visits two Southern California barbeque joints that serve smoked meat specialties on weekends.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Hamburgers
programme.desc: The deceptively simple ground meat served on a bun with the perfect combo of condiments and garnishes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Trinidad And Tobago
programme.desc: Andrew samples the island flavors and culinary mashups of Trinidad and Tobago. These islands have a passion for food and life, featuring dishes like curried crab with dumplings, crispy fried shark sandwiches and soft and silky flatbreads.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dallas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the big and bold flavors that are decidedly Dallas. From comforting chicken fried steak and sweet, creamy pecan pie to hearty tortilla soup and steak aged for 240 days.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mumbai
programme.desc: Andrew unveils Mumbai's multicultural flavors and addictive ingredients. A city built on chaos and hard work, Mumbai showcases its history through its delicious eateries. The city's edible icons include deep-fried fish and prawns and saucy goat.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chengdu
programme.desc: From the blistering 'Hot Pot' and fiery Mapo Tofu to spicy Kung Pao Chicken, Andrew Zimmern explores the famous scorching dishes that make Chengdu, China, a delicious destination.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: I'm Stuffed
programme.desc: Michael McKean goes on a spectacular journey of some super stuffed foods. Find out if bao are good enough to save our necks, if toasted ravioli are a big stuffed lie and whether knishes could once land you in jail.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Dishes In Disguise
programme.desc: All is not what it seems as Michael McKean reveals the truth behind dishes in disguise. He uncovers what it took to make turducken tick, and how it takes more than magic to get soup inside soup dumplings.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Finger Foods
programme.desc: Put down your fork and get ready to pick up some amazing finger food facts! Michael McKean has things handled, finding out how appetizers found their footing during Prohibition, that a king turned tapas into a tableside treat.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Gadgets And Gizmos
programme.desc: Michael McKean has gadgets and gizmos a'plenty, and he's ready to show them all off! Discover that waffle irons were once incredible artists and the stand mixer almost went overboard, and find out why refrigerators could have been left out in the cold.

programme.title: Good Eats: Oat Cuisine II

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From West Coast to Wisconsin

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Outlaw Scrooge McDuck!

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Armory of Cornelius Coot

programme.desc: The squad investigates the murder of a 12-year-old boy found dead in a known gang party house. The case is soon complicated when two more bodies are found at a different yet related house. Meanwhile, trouble brews in Provenza's romantic paradise.

programme.title: The Closer: Make Over

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Conspiracy on Death Island

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Invisible City

programme.desc: The discovery of a burnt body triggers an investigation that unearths a scandalous tale of lust, lies, and love triangles.

programme.title: Dateline: Deep in the Woods

programme.title: Dateline: The Other Side of Paradise
programme.desc: A father has fought to bring his daughter's killer to justice for ten years despite one setback after another.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Nightfall

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Burning Suspicion

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Shot in the Dark

programme.title: Relentless With Kate Snow: Not My Son

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Jurassic River Beast

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Italy's Lake Monster
programme.desc: The Lake Garda monster has been described as a huge, humped bear - half snake, half dinosaur. Jeremy travels to northern Italy to investigate and discovers that these picturesque waters could be hiding several enormous beasts.

programme.title: Hurricane Man: The Devil Comes to Florida
programme.desc: As a deadly Category 5 hurricane hits the coast of Florida, an expert storm-chaser uses cutting-edge tech to investigate what happens when one of the largest hurricanes in American history unleashes pandemonium on a Florida beach town.

programme.title: American Justice: Blood on the Staircase

programme.title: Nightwatch: Dark Side of the City
programme.desc: For the men and women on the Nightwatch, two things never stop: the calls and the questions. The first responders do everything they can to save the victims of several shootings, a drug overdose and more.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: Officers Roni and Cooper find themselves in a breathless foot chase after people are stabbed at a nightclub. Fire rescue's Doug and Stokes desperately try to save the life of a young man shot in his throat. A carjacking leads to a manhunt.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Cursed
programme.desc: After grappling with one mishap after another, Tom seeks the help of a voodoo priestess to see if she can cure him.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Mardi Gras
programme.desc: Deputies work around the clock in Terrebonne Parish, which is home to the second biggest Mardi Gras in the state.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Bug Off
programme.desc: Deputy Tom Arnold is called down the bayou to investigate a man disturbing his neighbours.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Bayou Beasts
programme.desc: Lt. Peter Guidry is dispatched to a property full of man-made booby traps, including trip wires and bear traps, and a tied-up gator acting as the property's guard dog.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Bone in My Swamp
programme.desc: Deputy Fitch heads to the docks to meet with a shrimper who believes he's caught a human bone in his shrimp net.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Catfish and Gators
programme.desc: When a vicious alligator attacks a dog, Deputy Melissa 'Catfish' Quintal calls in her alligator hunter boyfriend, Jacob Lirette, known as the 'Gator Man', to handle it. Also, deputies are sent in the dead of night to the eeriest bayous they've ever seen.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Shanked
programme.desc: An inmate with a shank sticking out of his stomach is rushed to the infirmary. Before losing consciousness, he gives the agents a lead on the case.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: The Informant
programme.desc: An inmate risks his life and turns informant to help Sergeant Hampton and Special Agent John Fisher eliminate the inmates' outside drug source.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Stuck
programme.desc: Two inmates suffer life-threatening stab wounds during a melee on the exercise yard that involves two rival gangs.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Maston/ Young
programme.desc: A man who had it all loses everything after his wife leaves him, taking their only child with her. Despondent over the loss, he robs a gas station and then leads police on a high-speed chase through the city streets of Indianapolis.

programme.title: Home Alone: Ex-ecutioner
programme.desc: When a single mom breaks up with her volatile boyfriend, she finds out he has other plans for her. Armed with a gun, he holds her hostage. As her life hangs in the balance, she has no idea her friend on the SWAT team is determined to save her.

programme.title: Home Alone: Portrait of a Stalker
programme.desc: In 2007, 17-year old Katie is living in Tennessee with her doting parents. But Katie's been keeping secrets, and her parents are shocked to discover she's being stalked by an ex-boyfriend they didn't know existed.

programme.title: Home Alone: First Flame
programme.desc: Sophia Putney-Wilcox is excited to start her senior year of high school after ending her abusive relationship with her boyfriend Adam. Unable to take the rejection, Adam breaks into her house with a bottle of gasoline and a lighter.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Cling 'Til Death
programme.desc: These Deadly Women won't let their men go.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Blood for Money
programme.desc: Money is the driving force behind many crimes, especially murder. These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed. From husbands to strangers to other people's babies - they spilt Blood for Money.

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: Footsteps in the Snow
programme.desc: A young mother is found brutally murdered in her own home in Chestnut Ridge, New York. Clues outside the house have footprints leading in, but none leading out.

programme.title: Deadly Women: The Takers
programme.desc: All of us would like a little extra cash, but only a few are prepared to steal a life to get it.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Shame of the Father
programme.desc: Two teenagers play with fire by entering into a secret relationship against a father intent on ending their storybook romance.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: To Love, Honor, and Kill
programme.desc: Noor and Marwan, young Iraqi American teens from feuding households, fall in love despite Noor's family's opposition.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Lies and Death
programme.desc: The facade of perfection thrives until a mystery gunman blows away an all-American girl and her wealthy doctor husband.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Recipe for Death
programme.desc: Eric gives up the Marines to follow his dream as a baker, and believes he's found the sweetest confection possible when he falls for Constance on a blind date. These foodies indulge in the good life until a seven-year itch is scratched by murder.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Hanging by a Thread
programme.desc: Tanya Buschman is just getting out of a nasty marriage when she falls for handsome Michel Bérubé, a bartender in Montreal. But it's not long before jealousy becomes foreplay for a suspicious suicide that has friends pointing fingers at friends.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Mid-life Murder
programme.desc: Arthur Burney believes it's true love when he runs off with Patricia Meeks, the waitress from his favorite bar. And soon Arthur and Patricia have a daughter of their own. But 16 years later, tensions are stretched to the limit, and someone will snap.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: In-Laws and Outlaws
programme.desc: A law professor gunned down in Tallahassee. Suspects arrested clear across the state one of them a reputed gang leader. And the question what was the connection? A tangled web of relationships and cash deposits place a family under the microscope.

programme.title: 20/20: Dying to Be Famous: The Versace Murders
programme.desc: We take a look back at the murder of Gianni Versace in the summer of 1997. 20 years later, many questions still remain. We investigate the twisting path of the making of serial killer Andrew Cunanan.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Family Business
programme.desc: An armored truck driver and his family commit a series of heists, eluding authorities for over a decade. But when one of them starts flashing the cash, their plan for living the good life begins to crumble.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Mister Wrong
programme.desc: Ty Underwood leaves her insular hometown to start fresh, vowing to be up-front with potential suitors about being transgender. Her shocking murder exposes chats with anonymous men on a phone app. The app may reveal a killer, but not identities.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Evil Among Us
programme.desc: In early August 2015, Jeffrey Kebler is found dead in his Clinton County, MI home. In order to track down his killer, detectives must follow a digital trail left by the victim. What they end up uncovering is way more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Deadly Connections
programme.desc: January 2013, high school freshman Shaniesha Forbes' body is found on a Brooklyn beach. NYPD Detectives begin piecing together her final moments and discover her social media life including a list of 1,600 Facebook friends and potential suspects.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Till Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Married couple Doug and Rozina Anderson's decision to take a long weekend in the peaceful woods of Northern California turns out to be a fateful mistake.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: El Chapo: Cartel Killer
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Whitey Bulger: Boston Mob King
programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Reagan's KGB Agent
programme.desc: Vladimir Vetrov was a top KGB spy until he betrayed his country and became a secret agent for the West. Codenamed 'Farewell,' he would become America's single greatest asset in the US-Soviet Spy war.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Escaping the Kill Room
programme.desc: KGB Colonel turned Double Agent Oleg Gordievsky has spent ten years spying for Britain's secret service, MI6. Now the Soviets are on to him. His only hope for survival is to attempt a daring exfiltration plan.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: The Honey Trap
programme.desc: Martha Peterson is a CIA secret weapon, operating as a woman in the man's world of espionage in Cold War Moscow. TRIGON is a KGB turncoat; ready to hand over top secret intelligence to bring down the Soviet Union from within.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Freemasons
programme.desc: The most secret of secret societies, The Freemasons, are intertwined with American history. Most of the Founding Fathers and 14 Presidents were Freemasons. Some say Washington DC is laid out as a Masonic code.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Escaping the Kill Room
programme.desc: KGB Colonel turned Double Agent Oleg Gordievsky has spent ten years spying for Britain's secret service, MI6. Now the Soviets are on to him. His only hope for survival is to attempt a daring exfiltration plan.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Freemasons
programme.desc: The most secret of secret societies, The Freemasons, are intertwined with American history. Most of the Founding Fathers and 14 Presidents were Freemasons. Some say Washington DC is laid out as a Masonic code.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Reagan's KGB Agent
programme.desc: Vladimir Vetrov was a top KGB spy until he betrayed his country and became a secret agent for the West. Codenamed 'Farewell,' he would become America's single greatest asset in the US-Soviet Spy war.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nuclear Apocalypse
programme.desc: The Cold War might be long gone, but the nuclear threat has re-emerged. Meet nuclear preparedness enthusiasts as they dig their bunkers and stockpile supplies, determined to survive a threat that could become a global apocalypse.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nostradamus
programme.desc: Nostradamus' prophecies have predicted some of the most dramatic and tragic events in history with chilling accuracy, and the worst to come. There are many among his followers who say that he was not sealing us to this fate, but warning us against it.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Battling the Elements
programme.desc: Firefighter Jack Pritchard fearlessly charges into blazing infernos to rescue victims, and when Hurricane Katrina pounded New Orleans, John Keller stepped up to save residents of his apartment building.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Soaring to New Heights
programme.desc: Test pilot Joe Kittinger volunteers to be the first man to parachute jump from the edge of space, and Air Force researcher Dr. John Stapp straps himself into rocket sleds to test the limits of human endurance.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Bulgaria's Murder Service
programme.desc: The crimes perpetrated in the name of Communism remain largely unexplored. Millions of people died in a secret war with the West. Hear the extraordinary story of the Bulgarian secret department called Service Seven (a killer force operating worldwide).

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican Archives hold the personal documents of past Popes, including pieces such as Galileo's trial transcript and King Henry VIII's annulment request. What else is hidden in the Vatican Library a place that is out of bounds even to Cardinals?

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Mary Magdalene
programme.desc: A look at the story of Mary Magdalene, a key figure in Christianity.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Master Suite Disaster
programme.desc: Rob overhauls the master bedroom and transforms it into an oasis with a view. Glass doors replace the entire wall and open up to a brand new balcony with its own spiral staircase. His final touch is a TV that drops from the ceiling.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Great Expansions
programme.desc: The ninjas are tasked with shaking up the main living room. They install all-new lighting to brighten up the dark space while the newly installed ceiling tiles add a touch of glamour. The finishing touch is a sea-inspired chandelier that's center stage.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Taking Charge of the Yard
programme.desc: This property's unsightly guesthouse is the only thing standing in the way of its curb appeal. After removing the structure the team take care of the law.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Spacing Out
programme.desc: After taking a trip to the Kennedy Space Center, Rob gets an out-of-this-world idea for an outdoor water feature: a rocket themed splash pad! It has all the bells and whistles including water jets and lights that make this outdoor oasis perfect.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: A Hot Rod Garage
programme.desc: A great house is not complete without the ultimate garage. This project includes a TV and lounge seating for a multifunctional space that shines. New pavers and a dazzling front gate make this one garage that's hard to drive by.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Sealing The Deal
programme.desc: Every inch of this house has been fully updated, customized and improved. It's a beautiful space perfect for entertaining, relaxing, or just having fun. This home keeps it real and at the end of the day, that's what seals the deal.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: 14-Mile House
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis juggles two projects in Detroit, and since both were built in 1928, she uses one house as inspiration for the other's renovations. When a car crashes into the house next door, she makes an unexpected discovery.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Brick by Brick Restoration
programme.desc: The Summit mansion hasn't been painted since 1972 and needs a major face lift. After years of damage, all of the outdoor wood railing and detail are rotting and need to be replaced.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Brightening the Bedrooms
programme.desc: Nicole tackles the upstairs bedrooms and bathroom which have had their natural beauty covered in old wallpaper and fixtures.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Fire Salvaged Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael see hidden potential in a fire-damaged Victorian and decide to save it from demolition. They open up the cramped space by turning a breezeway into a kitchen and repurpose an old safe.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Lawn and Order: She's a Brick House
programme.desc: Poison ivy, broken windows and a cramped patio are just a few items that need to be addressed if this couple wants to turn their home into the haven it was nearly two decades ago. Chris and Sara refresh the home with a low-maintenance design.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1760 Classic Colonial Parlor
programme.desc: An 1800s Center Colonial farmhouse addition to a 1760 stone home is turned into a classic parlor with a bar area and a billiards room.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1760 Guest House Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff restores a kitchen and living room in a 1760 farmhouse for Tracey and Scott, who now use it as a guest house. The house was the original structure on their farm, which now contains a newer main house and several outbuildings.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: From Studs to Spindles
programme.desc: Tamara Day steps in to finish the renovation of a 1890s Craftsman-style home. This home was previously ripped down to the studs by a contractor before it was abandoned.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Book Lamps and Bubble Glass
programme.desc: Renovations on the 1890s Craftsman-style home continues as Tamara enlarges the master bedroom and creates a beautiful study. She runs into trouble when the antique tiles for the bathroom floor are not salvageable. Tamara finds a way to re-use old glass.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Corbels and Chaos
programme.desc: Tamara sees great potential in a 1938 cottage with an unusual layout, unfinished renovation and no front door. She constructs a cathedral ceiling and creates two cedar corbels for the entrance. The cost of an egress window may crack her budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Corbels and Chaos
programme.desc: Tamara sees great potential in a 1938 cottage with an unusual layout, unfinished renovation and no front door. She constructs a cathedral ceiling and creates two cedar corbels for the entrance. The cost of an egress window may crack her budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Double Dutch Dilemma
programme.desc: Tamara gets the opportunity to renovate a French chateau she's wanted to tackle for years. She finds that a recent renovation left the kitchen looking outdated and tacky, but she's determined to create a home full of authentic details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles
programme.desc: Tamara continues work on a French chateau as she overhauls a large master suite covered in the tackiest wallpaper she's ever ripped out. She plans to move a bathroom to create an additional bedroom and extend a hallway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Rhapsody in Beige
programme.desc: Tamara transforms a contemporary home on a large wooded lot that's devoid of any character. She installs huge windows to bring the outdoors inside, but she faces issues with resurfacing a fireplace veneer.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Pain in the Deck
programme.desc: Continuing renovations on a large and bland contemporary home, Tamara tackles the master suite and replaces lots of dated cabinetry to make a stylish bathroom. She also creates a home heather and immense deck and patio.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All Bricked Out
programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All About the Island
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a large 1905 colonial with seven sun porches. She overhauls an ugly kitchen and a dining room with tacky orange carpet, but unsupported floors and a strange noise during demo slow her plans and may cost her big money.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Closet Fit for a Queen
programme.desc: Tamara creates a 900-square-foot master suite and converts one of the home's seven sun porches into a closet. However, her budget takes a hit when she needs to install a new HVAC unit and her plan to save a vintage fireplace might be out of gas.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Catwalk Craziness
programme.desc: Tamara Day starts on a 1900 Kansas City Shirtwaist-style home containing a living room with a catwalk instead of a ceiling. She pulls up linoleum flooring and gives the damaged foyer staircase a facelift.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: When One Barn Door Closes
programme.desc: After restoring a fourth bedroom in the Shirtwaist home, Tamara creates a reading nook and closet to complete the room. Then the Kansas City weather creates a problem in the front yard, while two vanities might not fit in the master bath.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Mural of the Story
programme.desc: Tamara works on restoring a 1909 Craftsman home, ripping out the tacky additions that have stripped it of its original charm. She saves a wallpaper mural that could be the showpiece of the dining room, if she can keep it from being destroyed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Clowning Around
programme.desc: Tamara continues with the 1909 Craftsman, transforming a small bedroom into the master bath. She saves and refurbishes French doors, vintage sinks, and a tub from the house, while adding modern elements like a sauna.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fireplaces and Wired Spaces
programme.desc: Tamara annexes an oversized dining room to enlarge a tiny kitchen in a 1926 English Tudor. She rips out an outdated and tacky mantel to create a stunning fireplace surround, and then creates a large desktop for an in-home office.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Two-deck Tudor
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to create a more spacious master suite until she decides to add a second deck to a 1926 English Tudor. In the backyard, she adds an outdoor living area with a fire pit. She and her dad then realize the garage doors may cause a problem.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Camp Pop
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to northern Indiana, where the Hoosiers in Valparaiso are doing things right at the Porter County Fair. The Super Ramen Dog combines two delicious foods Noah didn't know belonged together, the Elephant Ear Taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the hometown hero, the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: The Whole Hog
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes hog-wild all day with dishes that use every single part of the pig. Simple strips of bacon for breakfast just won't do, and forget about basic barbecue. These are the perfect porky portions for an entire day of pigging out.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Between the Bun
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson reveals entirely excessive and utterly outrageous takes on the humble hamburger. Beef patties and two buns are required, but every other ingredient is maxed out to create the most exorbitant burgers ever imagined.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: #throwback
programme.desc: We're talking about throwback dishes that are better now than ever before.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Southern Charm
programme.desc: Rogers checks out the best rich, hearty, home-style cooking straight from the South.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Los Angeles, California
programme.desc: Casey travels to sunny Los Angeles for some epic eats including a 2.5-pound fusion burrito loaded with every ingredient in the kitchen and drenched in hot sauce 600 times hotter than a jalapeno.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Barbara, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek takes him to Santa Barbara, California, where he first feasts on a 2-pound portion of steamed local crab. Then he meets up with a tri-tip steak sandwich served with homemade barbecue sauce and apple horseradish.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New York, NY
programme.desc: Casey travels to New York City for the best in big city eats, including an insane challenge that has him choosing between a 151-ounce milkshake, an eight-pound sloppy joe or six habanero ghost chili wings.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Baltimore, MD
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epic eating expedition brings him to Baltimore for an out-of-this-world diner, a classic crab feast and a four-pound pho fight.

programme.desc: This documentary follows legendary fashion designer Diane von Furstenberg in her quest to discover how Statue of Liberty sculptor Auguste Bartholdi's dream became a reality and what the statue means to people around the world.

programme.desc: A look at life in NYC during the 1970s and '80s when porn and prostitution ruled.

programme.title: The Righteous Gemstones
programme.desc: A deviant family of greedy, world famous televangelists live their lives.

programme.title: Succession: This Is Not for Tears
programme.desc: Themes of power and politics play out within a rich and dysfunctional family.

programme.title: Room 104: Drywall Guys

programme.title: Movie: In Her Shoes
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters, with opposite dispositions, find out what bonds them together after meeting the grandmother they never knew existed.

programme.title: The Number on Great-Grandpa's Arm
programme.desc: A conversation between a boy and his great-grandfather, an Auschwitz survivor, is woven with historical footage and animation to tell a heartbreaking story of Jewish life in Eastern Europe.

programme.title: Movie: The Fourth Kind
programme.desc: A psychologist interviews people who live in an Alaskan town with too many unexplained disappearances. After hearing their horror stories, the doctor suspects a federal cover-up is to blame.

programme.title: Movie: Sphere
programme.desc: An expert scientific team assembles to investigate a phenomenon discovered off the coast of California: a half-mile long spherical spacecraft, undisturbed for 300 years.

programme.title: Movie: Welcome to Marwen
programme.desc: After a horrific attack leaves him broken and with no memories, Mark Hogancamp copes with his painful and confusing life by building a miniature replica of a World War II village, complete with resident dolls that resemble himself and his friends.

programme.title: Movie: Diego Maradona
programme.desc: This documentary covers the life and career of the legendary football player Diego Armando Maradona, and features footage from 500 hours of never-seen-before video.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Times at the El Royale
programme.desc: In 1969 several stranges have a chance meeting at Lake Tahoe's El Royale, each of them holding on to a dark past. Over the course of the night, their secrets meet and unravel, sending them all into chaos.

programme.title: Movie: Bohemian Rhapsody
programme.desc: Singer and songwriter Freddie Mercury helps form the band Queen, but at the same time that his flamboyant stage presence and powerful vocals lead the group to new levels of stardom his tumultuous personal life begins to spiral out of control.

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Fockers

programme.desc: A deviant family of greedy, world famous televangelists live their lives.

programme.desc: A man wanted by various hit men fights to stay alive long enough for his life insurance policy to kick in for his estranged daughter.

programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at how a movie or show is made.

programme.title: Movie: Beaches
programme.desc: A chance encounter sparks a once-in-a-lifetime friendship between a rich debutante and a cynical struggling entertainer.

programme.title: Movie: Catfish
programme.desc: A filmmaker follows the life of his brother, a New York photographer, and becomes intertwined in an online intrigue of love and deception.

programme.title: Movie: The Miseducation of Cameron Post
programme.desc: After she's caught making out with the prom queen, a teenage girl's guardians send her to spend some time at a religious camp where she bonds with the other youth and rebels against the well-meaning adults who think that they're trying to help.

programme.title: Movie: Widows
programme.desc: After their husbands are all killed during a heist that goes horribly wrong, three desperate widows decide to finish the job so that they can pay off the debts left by their late spouses, but none of them have any experience with staging a robbery.

programme.title: Movie: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: A pregnant Sophie grows closer to her mother as she shares stories of how she came to live on a Greek island and how she met three handsome young men, any of whom could be Sophie's father, but an unexpected visit from Sophie's grandmother changes things.

programme.title: Movie: Night School
programme.desc: A man who's tired of his dead-end life and humiliating job signs up for night school so that he can pass the GED exam and finally be a high school graduate, but with an eclectic group of students the teacher turns to unconventional ways of teaching.

programme.title: Movie: Imperium
programme.desc: Nate Foster, an idealistic FBI agent, is tasked with infiltrating a radical right-wing terrorist group of white supremacists. The analyst finds it increasingly difficult to hide his own principles ad he hears of a dangerous plot to build a bomb.

programme.title: Hitsville: The Making of Motown
programme.desc: The story of Motown told through interviews with the label's founder, Berry Gordy, and many of its stars and creative figures. Featuring rare performances and behind-the-scene footage.

programme.title: The Affair
programme.desc: Allegations against Noah surface and he seeks guidance on how to handle the situation. Helen celebrates a birthday and protects Sierra during an extremely trying time.

programme.title: Movie: Braveheart
programme.desc: A 13th century Scottish liberator rebels against the English who try to rule Scotland.

programme.desc: Sam, Dean and Castiel call on Rowena to help keep the evil souls at bay and get an unexpected assist from Ketch.

programme.title: Legacies: This Year Will Be Different
programme.desc: Hope's latest hunt leads her on a collision course with the past she's been trying to leave behind. Landon's newfound status as the popular guy leads to tensions with Josie. A mysterious vampire arrives. Salvatore School meets their new headmaster.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Ross Finds Out
programme.desc: Ross becomes very upset when Rachel leaves a message saying that she is over him.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Marine Biologist
programme.desc: Jerry tells an old classmate that George is a marine biologist and George plays along.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: School Recital
programme.desc: Molly is so focused on directing a school recital that she doesn't realize a fellow teacher is hitting on her. Meanwhile, Vince convinces Mike to join him in an unusual money-making scheme.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Dial 1-900-MIX-A-LOT
programme.desc: Alan's girlfriend insists he confess his true identity to Larry, and Walden goes on a road trip with Jenny and Barry.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: While attending a Phillies baseball game, Murray says Adam is old enough to leave his seat on his own. When a nervous Adam leaves, he immediately gets flustered and gets lost at the stadium.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Wingmom
programme.desc: Inspired by 'Top Gun,' Barry decides to join ROTC. Convinced it will help discipline him, Murray orders the Captain to prevent Barry from quitting when the going gets tough, prompting Beverly to join Barry, too.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And Martha Stewart Have a Ball
programme.desc: Max and Caroline plan to attend a big fashion gala at a museum where Martha Stewart is scheduled to be a guest, in an attempt to have her taste their cupcakes and get her seal of approval.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: Fits and Starts
programme.desc: Tasha and Pookie awkwardly explore becoming more than friends. Meanwhile, Melanie and Derwin have their hands full with DJ when Janay goes out of town with Noah.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Free Range Parents
programme.desc: Amidst the mass chaos of picking up Ryan from school, Mike asks a reluctant Ryan to let Boyd walk home unsupervised. Meanwhile, Ed and Kyle hold a 'Doomsday Preppers' meeting, and Eve and Mandy try to keep a secret from Vanessa.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Sherri Shepherd, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Kathy Griffin, and Billy Gardell.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Crawley vs. Pompey
programme.desc: A woman accuses the father of her two children of being a flagrant serial cheater, but his denials are contradicted by a surprise witness.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: No Fish for You; Sparking Up Tension
programme.desc: Fisherman's catch comes up short. Woman sues for damage to her lawn done by fireworks.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Handsy Haunted House/ Who's Liable Anyway?
programme.desc: A haunted house performer is injured; a woman’s car is damaged in her parking garage.

programme.title: Right This Minute

programme.title: Daily Mail TV

programme.title: This Just in With Robin Hamilton
programme.desc: Robin Hamilton covers local issues in the Washington, D.C area.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Phillips vs. Polk
programme.desc: A woman on a revenge mission ends up catching feelings for the man she claims fathered her one-month-old daughter.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Which Right of Way/ Old Scars, New Pain
programme.desc: A cyclist is injured by a car in a crosswalk and a woman sues for the value of her father's hockey jersey.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Guests appear to expose their outrageous stories, from kinky relationships to crazy obsessions.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The Plaintiff says her father was killed before she was born and years later discovered through social media that the Defendant may be her sister, so she has petitioned the court for a sibling DNA test.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: The presiding judge serves as an arbitrator in these real-life small-claims court cases.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Get Outta My Car ; Refusing a Fee ; Letting the Cat Out Of the Bag.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: The Greedy Grinch/ Camera Relocation
programme.desc: Woman sues former friend for selling toys online; man sues over antique camera.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A sister sues her brother for $5,000 and blames his kids for getting evicted. Then, a woman claims a man stole her puppy without paying. He says he would've paid if he wasn't the target of threats and harassment.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Grandmother Accused of Molestation
programme.desc: Brittany has two young children with Joey, and accuses their grandmother Pamela of molesting them. Pamela claims that Brittany is the molester, and Joey has no idea who to believe. Then, Gavin accuses ex-girlfriend Dasheona of abusing their children.

programme.title: Maury: Are Two Different Men the Fathers of My Two Kids? Test Them!
programme.desc: Kennetra thought Marcus was a man who had a lot going for him, but he keeps denying her son. Jonathan and Breana's marriage is in danger, because Jonathan Breanna's youngest child isn't his.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Family Drama
programme.desc: TiTi made a big mistake when she hooked up with her cousin, Shativa's man Damo. Now Shativa's here because she found out she's pregnant with Damo's child and she's recruited her best friend to get revenge on TiTi.

programme.title: Maury
programme.desc: Maury Povich explores compelling issues that impact society as a whole, and digs deep to get to the heart of the matter.

programme.title: Movie: Sex and the City 2
programme.desc: When Samantha is offered an all-expenses paid trip to Abu Dhabi, Carrie, Miranda and Charlotte trade in their day-to-day lives for a little rest, relaxation and shopping in the beautiful United Arab Emirates.

programme.title: Movie: I Love You Phillip Morris
programme.desc: When a happily married man realizes that he is gay, he decides to live life to the fullest, which lands him in jail.

programme.title: Movie: Wild Hogs
programme.desc: A group of middle-aged men try to put their troubles behind them as they set out on a road trip on their Harleys.

programme.title: Movie: Mr. Right
programme.desc: A young woman falls in love with a seemingly perfect guy, except he has one major flaw: he's a professional assassin. As the criminals who employ him start to come after him, she must decide if she'll run away or join in the mayhem.

programme.title: Movie: Love Actually
programme.desc: Ten different British couples sort out their love lives during the Christmas holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Isn't It Romantic
programme.desc: After woman who has spent her whole life feeling cynical about love and romance suffers a nasty hit to the head, she wakes up to find herself living in a romantic comedy, complete with new friends and a new love interest vying for her attention.

programme.title: Movie: Hello, Dolly!
programme.desc: A widow tries to find a new wife for a widowed merchant, despite her feelings for him.

programme.desc: Young hockey players get scholarships to a snobby, high-ranking prep school.

programme.title: Movie: The Rundown
